member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.BmpImporter
member.summary: Imports data from a BMP "file" into an ImportedBmpImage.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.BmpImporter.#ctor(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.BmpImporter.CopyTrueColorMemoryBitmap(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies images without color palette.
member.param: 4 (32bpp RGB), 3 (24bpp RGB, 32bpp ARGB)
true (ARGB), false (RGB)

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask
member.summary: Helper class for creating bitmap masks (8 pels per byte).

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.MaskData
member.summary: Returns the bitmap mask that will be written to PDF.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.MaskUsed
member.summary: Indicates whether the mask has transparent pels.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a bitmap mask.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.StartLine(System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts a new line.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.AddPel(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a pel to the current line.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.MonochromeMask.AddPel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a pel from an alpha mask value.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.BitmapImageImporter.UpdateWidthAndHeight(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage)
member.summary: Updates the height and width based on PixelHeight, PixelWidth, and the DPI settings.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.BitmapImageImporter.RoundDpiAfterConversionFromMetricValue(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage)
member.summary: When DPI values are calculated from metric values, try to round a integer when appropriate.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ToBeNamed
member.summary: Image importer class.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ToBeNamed.TryImportImage(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage@)
member.summary: Tries to import an image. Returns true on success.
member.param: The bitmap image stream.
The imported image.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ToBeNamed.TryImportImage(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage@)
member.summary: Tries to import an image. Returns true on success.
member.param: The bitmap bytes.
The imported image.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ToBeNamed.TryImportImageBmp(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage@)
member.summary: Tries to import a BMP image. Returns true on success.
member.param: The bitmap bytes.
The imported image.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage
member.summary: Represents an imported image.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.InchPerMeter
member.summary: The number of inches per meter

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.ImageFormat
member.summary: Gets the image format.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.Width
member.summary: Gets the width of the image in Point.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.Height
member.summary: Gets the height of the image in Point.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.DpiX
member.summary: Gets the horizontal DPI value.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.DpiY
member.summary: Gets the vertical DPI value.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.PixelWidth
member.summary: Gets the width of the image in pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.PixelHeight
member.summary: Gets the height of the image in pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.ImageData
member.summary: Gets the raw image data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedImage.GetPdfImageData
member.summary: Gets the image data needed for PDF.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage
member.summary: Represents an imported raster image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.AlphaMaskData
member.summary: Gets the alpha mask data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.BitmapMaskData
member.summary: Gets the bitmap mask data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.BitmapMask
member.summary: Gets the bitmap mask.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.ExtractedImageData
member.summary: Gets the extracted image data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.PaletteData
member.summary: Gets the color palette data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.PaletteColors
member.summary: Gets the number of palette colors.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.GetPdfImageData
member.summary: Gets the image data needed for PDF.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.GetPdfAlphaMaskData
member.summary: Gets the alpha mask data needed for PDF.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.GetPdfBitmapMaskData
member.summary: Gets the bitmap mask data needed for PDF.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.GetPdfBitmapMask
member.summary: Gets the PDF bitmap mask.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.GetPdfPaletteData
member.summary: Gets the palette data needed for PDF.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.BitCount
member.summary: The bit count per pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedRasterImage.ColorsUsed
member.summary: The colors used. Only valid for images with palettes, will be 0 otherwise.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage
member.summary: Represents an imported BMP image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.Bitonal
member.summary: Gets a value indicating if the image is bitonal.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.IsGray
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this image is grayscale.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.SegmentedColorMask
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the image has a segmented color mask.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.FirstMaskColor
member.summary: Gets the first color of the mask.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.LastMaskColor
member.summary: Gets the last color of the mask.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedBmpImage.BytesFileOffset
member.summary: Gets the file offset of the data bytes.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedPngImage
member.summary: Represents an imported PNG image.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedJpegImage
member.summary: Represents an imported JPEG image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedJpegImage.DpmX
member.summary: The horizontal DPM (dots per meter). Can be 0 if not supported by the image format.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedJpegImage.DpmY
member.summary: The vertical DPM (dots per meter). Can be 0 if not supported by the image format.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedJpegImage.HorizontalAspectRatio
member.summary: The horizontal component of the aspect ratio. Can be 0 if not supported by the image format. Note: Aspect ratio will be set if either DPI or DPM was set but may also be available in the absence of both DPI and DPM.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedJpegImage.VerticalAspectRatio
member.summary: The vertical component of the aspect ratio. Can be 0 if not supported by the image format.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats
member.summary: The image formats.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Unknown
member.summary: The unknown format.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Indexed1
member.summary: Color palette with 1 bit per pixel.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Indexed4
member.summary: Color palette with 4 bits per pixel.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Indexed8
member.summary: Color palette with 8 bits per pixel.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Gray8
member.summary: Grayscale image.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Bgr32
member.summary: RGB image with 24 bits per pixel.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.Bgra32
member.summary: RGB image with 24 bits per pixel and alpha channel.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.JPEG
member.summary: Standard JPEG format (RGB).

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.JPEGGRAY
member.summary: Gray-scale JPEG format.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.JPEGRGBW
member.summary: JPEG file with inverted CMYK, thus RGBW.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImageFormats.JPEGCMYK
member.summary: JPEG file with CMYK.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser
member.summary: Helper for dealing with byte[] data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The raw data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser.Reset
member.summary: Resets this instance.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser.Data
member.summary: Gets the data as byte[].

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of Data.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ReaderHelper
member.summary: Helper for dealing with Streams and files.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ReaderHelper.ReadFromFile(System.String)
member.summary: Reads from a file.
member.exception: Image files larger than 2 GiB are not supported.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ReaderHelper.ReadFromStream(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Reads from a stream.
member.exception: stream - Stream has no content byte array.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker
member.summary: Helper for dealing with Stream data, including streams that do not implement the Length property.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.StreamLengthFromStream(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Gets the length of the stream. Return -1 if length cannot be determined.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.Reset
member.summary: Resets this instance.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.OriginalStream
member.summary: Gets the original stream.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.Data
member.summary: Gets the data as byte[].

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of Data.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.StreamReaderWorker.OwnedMemoryStream
member.summary: Gets the owned memory stream. Can be null if no MemoryStream was created.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.PngImageImporter.TestPngFileHeader(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser)
member.summary: A quick check for PNG files, checking the first 16 bytes.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.PngImageImporter.TestPngInfoHeader(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.DataParser,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.ImportedPngImage)
member.summary: Read information from PNG image header.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.PngImageImporter.MyVisitor.Visit(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Invoked for every chunk of the PNG file. Used to extract additional information.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Adam7.PassToScanlineGridIndex
member.summary: For a given pass number (1 indexed) the scanline indexes of the lines included in that pass in the 8x8 grid.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Adler32Checksum
member.summary: Used to calculate the Adler-32 checksum used for ZLIB data in accordance with RFC 1950: ZLIB Compressed Data Format Specification.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Adler32Checksum.Calculate(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate the Adler-32 checksum for some data.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader
member.summary: The header for a data chunk in a PNG file.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.Position
member.summary: The position/start of the chunk header within the stream.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.Length
member.summary: The length of the chunk in bytes.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.Name
member.summary: The name of the chunk, uppercase first letter means the chunk is critical (vs. ancillary).

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.IsCritical
member.summary: Whether the chunk is critical (must be read by all readers) or ancillary (may be ignored).

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.IsPublic
member.summary: A public chunk is one that is defined in the International Standard or is registered in the list of public chunk types maintained by the Registration Authority. Applications can also define private (unregistered) chunk types for their own purposes.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.IsSafeToCopy
member.summary: Whether the (if unrecognized) chunk is safe to copy.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new .

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ColorType
member.summary: Describes the interpretation of the image data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ColorType.None
member.summary: Grayscale.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ColorType.PaletteUsed
member.summary: Colors are stored in a palette rather than directly in the data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ColorType.ColorUsed
member.summary: The image uses color.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ColorType.AlphaChannelUsed
member.summary: The image has an alpha channel.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.CompressionMethod
member.summary: The method used to compress the image data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.CompressionMethod.DeflateWithSlidingWindow
member.summary: Deflate/inflate compression with a sliding window of at most 32768 bytes.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Crc32
member.summary: 32-bit Cyclic Redundancy Code used by the PNG for checking the data is intact.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Crc32.Calculate(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculate the CRC32 for data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Crc32.Calculate(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Byte})
member.summary: Calculate the CRC32 for data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Crc32.Calculate(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculate the combined CRC32 for data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Decoder.GetPaethValue(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Computes a simple linear function of the three neighboring pixels (left, above, upper left), then chooses as predictor the neighboring pixel closest to the computed value.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterMethod
member.summary: Indicates the pre-processing method applied to the image data before compression.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterMethod.AdaptiveFiltering
member.summary: Adaptive filtering with five basic filter types.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterType.None
member.summary: The raw byte is unaltered.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterType.Sub
member.summary: The byte to the left.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterType.Up
member.summary: The byte above.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterType.Average
member.summary: The mean of bytes left and above, rounded down.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.FilterType.Paeth
member.summary: Byte to the left, above or top-left based on Paeth’s algorithm.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.IChunkVisitor
member.summary: Enables execution of custom logic whenever a chunk is read.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.IChunkVisitor.Visit(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ChunkHeader,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Called by the PNG reader after a chunk is read.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader
member.summary: The high level information about the image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.Width
member.summary: The width of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.Height
member.summary: The height of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.BitDepth
member.summary: The bit depth of the image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.ColorType
member.summary: The color type of the image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.CompressionMethod
member.summary: The compression method used for the image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.FilterMethod
member.summary: The filter method used for the image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader.InterlaceMethod
member.summary: The interlace method used by the image..
Create a new .

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.InterlaceMethod
member.summary: Indicates the transmission order of the image data.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.InterlaceMethod.None
member.summary: No interlace.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.InterlaceMethod.Adam7
member.summary: Adam7 interlace.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette
member.summary: The Palette class.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette.HasAlphaValues
member.summary: True if palette has alpha values.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette.Data
member.summary: The palette data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a palette object. Input palette data length from PLTE chunk must be a multiple of 3.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette.SetAlphaValues(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Adds transparency values from tRNS chunk.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette.GetPixel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the palette entry for a specific index.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel
member.summary: A pixel in a image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.R
member.summary: The red value for the pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.G
member.summary: The green value for the pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.B
member.summary: The blue value for the pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.A
member.summary: The alpha transparency value for the pixel.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.IsGrayscale
member.summary: Whether the pixel is grayscale (if , and will all have the same value).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new .
member.param: The red value for the pixel.
The green value for the pixel.
The blue value for the pixel.
The alpha transparency value for the pixel.
Whether the pixel is grayscale.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Create a new which has false and is fully opaque.
member.param: The red value for the pixel.
The green value for the pixel.
The blue value for the pixel.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.#ctor(System.Byte)
member.summary: Create a new grayscale .
member.param: The grayscale value.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel.Equals(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel)
member.summary: Whether the pixel values are equal.
member.param: The other pixel.
member.returns: if all pixel values are equal otherwise .

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png
member.summary: A PNG image. Call to open from file or bytes.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Header
member.summary: The header data from the PNG image.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Width
member.summary: The width of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Height
member.summary: The height of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.HasAlphaChannel
member.summary: Whether the image has an alpha (transparency) layer.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.GetPixelIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the palette index at the given column and row (x, y).
member.remarks: Pixel values are generated on demand from the underlying data to prevent holding many items in memory at once, so consumers should cache values if they’re going to be looped over many times.
member.param: The x coordinate (column).
The y coordinate (row).
member.returns: The palette index of the pixel at the coordinate.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.GetPalette
member.summary: Gets the color palette.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.GetPixel(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the pixel at the given column and row (x, y).
member.remarks: Pixel values are generated on demand from the underlying data to prevent holding many items in memory at once, so consumers should cache values if they’re going to be looped over many times.
member.param: The x coordinate (column).
The y coordinate (row).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.IChunkVisitor)
member.summary: Read the PNG image from the stream.
member.param: The stream containing PNG data to be read.
Optional: A visitor which is called whenever a chunk is read by the library.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings)
member.summary: Read the PNG image from the stream.
member.param: The stream containing PNG data to be read.
Settings to apply when opening the PNG.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.IChunkVisitor)
member.summary: Read the PNG image from the bytes.
member.param: The bytes of the PNG data to be read.
Optional: A visitor which is called whenever a chunk is read by the library.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings)
member.summary: Read the PNG image from the bytes.
member.param: The bytes of the PNG data to be read.
Settings to apply when opening the PNG.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.IChunkVisitor)
member.summary: Read the PNG from the file path.
member.param: The path to the PNG file to open.
Optional: A visitor which is called whenever a chunk is read by the library.
member.remarks: This will open the file to obtain a so will lock the file during reading.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png.Open(System.String,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings)
member.summary: Read the PNG from the file path.
member.param: The path to the PNG file to open.
Settings to apply when opening the PNG.
member.remarks: This will open the file to obtain a so will lock the file during reading.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder
member.summary: Used to construct PNG images. Call to make a new builder.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.Create(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a builder for a PNG with the given width and size.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.FromPng(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Png)
member.summary: Create a builder from a .

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.FromPngBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a builder from the bytes of the specified PNG image.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.FromBgra32Pixels(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a builder from the bytes in the BGRA32 pixel format. https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.windows.media.pixelformats.bgra32
member.param: The pixels in BGRA32 format.
The width in pixels.
The height in pixels.
Whether to include an alpha channel in the output.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.FromBgra32Pixels(System.IO.Stream,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a builder from the bytes in the BGRA32 pixel format. https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.windows.media.pixelformats.bgra32
member.param: The pixels in BGRA32 format.
The width in pixels.
The height in pixels.
Whether to include an alpha channel in the output.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SetPixel(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the RGB pixel value for the given column (x) and row (y).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SetPixel(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Pixel,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the pixel value for the given column (x) and row (y).

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.StoreText(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Allows you to store arbitrary text data in the "iTXt" international textual data chunks of the generated PNG image.
member.param: A keyword identifying the text data between 1-79 characters in length. Must not start with, end with, or contain consecutive white-space characters. Only characters in the range 32 - 126 and 161 - 255 are permitted.
The text data to store. Encoded as UTF-8 that may not contain zero (0) bytes but can be zero-length.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.Save(PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions)
member.summary: Get the bytes of the PNG file for this builder.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.Save(System.IO.Stream,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions)
member.summary: Write the PNG file bytes to the provided stream.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.AttemptCompressionOfRawData(System.Byte[],PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions)
member.summary: Attempt to improve compressibility of the raw data by using adaptive filtering.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring generation of PNGs from a .

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions.AttemptCompression
member.summary: Whether the library should try to reduce the resulting image size. This process does not affect the original image data (it is lossless) but may result in longer save times.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngBuilder.SaveOptions.MaxDegreeOfParallelism
member.summary: The number of parallel tasks allowed during compression.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings
member.summary: Settings to use when opening a PNG using

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings.ChunkVisitor
member.summary: The code to execute whenever a chunk is read. Can be .

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.PngOpenerSettings.DisallowTrailingData
member.summary: Whether to throw if the image contains data after the image end marker. by default.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.RawPngData
member.summary: Provides convenience methods for indexing into a raw byte array to extract pixel values.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.RawPngData.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.Palette,PdfSharp.Internal.Imaging.Png.BigGustave.ImageHeader)
member.summary: Create a new .
member.param: The decoded pixel data as bytes.
The number of bytes in each pixel.
The palette for the image.
The image header.
